stemHtml: Even if there is no damage to the aircraft, is it required to submit a report after a bird strike?

options.a: Yes, to the air traffic service (ATS) unit as soon as flight crew workload allows.
options.c: Yes, to the ATS unit by radio and by submitting a written report after landing.
options.d: No, there is no need to report it if there is no damage to the aircraft.
